summary: Completed comprehensive testing of HOD, Exam Cell, and Marks Workflow features. All 18 backend tests passed. All frontend features verified working: HOD Dashboard (Overview, Faculty Management, Mark Reviews tabs), Exam Cell Dashboard (Overview, Approved Midterms, End-term Marks, Upload Marks tabs), Teacher Marks Entry (subject selection, marks input, save draft, submit for approval), and full marks workflow (Teacher submits -> HOD approves -> Exam Cell sees approved marks).

issues: Console warning: '<span> cannot be a child of <option>' - minor React hydration warning in teacher select dropdown

passed_tests: Backend: HOD login (HOD001/hod123) returns 200 with role=hod
Backend: HOD dashboard returns stats (teachers, students, assignments, pending_reviews)
Backend: HOD dashboard requires hod role (403 for student)
Backend: Exam Cell login (EC001/exam123) returns 200 with role=exam_cell
Backend: Exam Cell dashboard returns stats (approved_midterms, endterm, published, draft)
Backend: GET /api/faculty/assignments returns seeded assignments for HOD
Backend: GET /api/faculty/teachers returns teachers in department
Backend: POST /api/faculty/assignments creates new assignment
Backend: Teacher login (T001/teacher123) returns 200 with role=teacher
Backend: GET /api/marks/my-assignments returns 2 assignments for T001
Backend: GET /api/marks/students returns students for DS/2022/A
Backend: POST /api/marks/entry saves marks as draft
Backend: GET /api/marks/submissions returns submissions for HOD
Backend: GET /api/examcell/approved-marks returns approved marks
Backend: GET /api/examcell/endterm returns endterm entries
Backend: POST /api/examcell/upload accepts CSV file and processes students
Backend: Teacher2 login (T002/teacher123) works
Backend: Admin dashboard shows total_hods and total_exam_cell counts
Frontend: HOD Dashboard loads with Overview, Faculty Management, Mark Reviews tabs
Frontend: HOD Overview shows 4 stat cards (Teachers, Students, Assignments, Pending Reviews)
Frontend: HOD Faculty Management shows 3 seeded assignments (Dr. Sarah Johnson, Prof. Ravi Kumar)
Frontend: HOD Add Assignment form has teacher select, subject code, subject name fields
Frontend: HOD Mark Reviews tab shows submissions with approve/reject buttons
Frontend: Exam Cell Dashboard loads with Overview, Approved Midterms, End-term Marks, Upload Marks tabs
Frontend: Exam Cell Overview shows 4 stat cards
Frontend: Exam Cell Approved Midterms shows HOD-approved marks with student details
Frontend: Exam Cell Upload Marks form has all required fields and file upload
Frontend: Teacher Dashboard shows Marks Entry card
Frontend: Teacher Marks Entry shows subject assignments (Automata Theory, Machine Learning)
Frontend: Teacher can select subject and see student list for marks entry
Frontend: Teacher can enter marks, save as draft, and submit for approval
Frontend: Full workflow: Teacher submits -> HOD approves -> Exam Cell sees approved marks
critical_code_review_comments: Minor: HodDashboard.js line 151 - Teacher select dropdown has span inside option which causes React hydration warning. Consider using plain text instead of JSX expression.

success_rate.frontend: 100% (all HOD, Exam Cell, and Marks Entry features verified working)

seed_data_creation: Used existing seed data. Created test marks entry for Automata Theory (mid2) which was approved by HOD.
context_for_next_testing_agent: HOD, Exam Cell, and Marks Workflow features are fully functional. The marks workflow is: Teacher enters mid1/mid2 marks -> saves draft -> submits -> HOD reviews/approves -> Exam Cell sees approved marks -> Exam Cell can upload endterm via CSV -> publishes. All data-testid attributes are properly set. The database has seeded users (HOD001, EC001, T001, T002) and faculty assignments (3 subjects). Test marks entry was created for Automata Theory mid2 and approved.

hod_dashboard.details: Overview shows stats (2 teachers, 3 students, 3 assignments, 0 pending). Faculty Management shows 3 seeded assignments. Mark Reviews shows approved submission with remarks.

hod_faculty_management.details: Lists assignments, Add Assignment form works with teacher select, subject code/name inputs. Delete assignment button present.

hod_mark_reviews.details: Shows submissions with status badges (submitted/approved/rejected). Approve/Reject buttons work. Shows student marks table and remarks.

exam_cell_dashboard.details: Overview shows stats (approved midterms, endterm entries, published, draft). All 4 tabs functional.

exam_cell_approved_midterms.details: Shows HOD-approved marks with subject, teacher, batch/section, and student marks table.

exam_cell_upload.details: CSV upload form with subject code, name, semester, department, batch, section fields. File upload accepts CSV/XLSX.

teacher_marks_entry.details: Shows subject assignments. Clicking subject loads student list. Mid-term 1/2 tabs. Marks input fields. Save Draft and Submit for Approval buttons.

marks_workflow.details: Full workflow tested: Teacher saves draft -> submits -> HOD approves with remarks -> Exam Cell sees approved marks.
